![](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/left-arrow.png)

#### Start Virtual Appointment

×

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### Get Info Without the Office Visit

Here how it's work...

![Smile](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/smile.png)

Info about the patient

![Smile](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/checklist.png)

Choose your options

![Smile](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/camera.png)

5 quick teeth selfies

Select treatment you are looking for\*

Cosmetic Dentistry

(Veneers, Whitening)

Crooked teeth

(Invisalign)

Replace missing teeth

(Bridge, Implants, Crowns, Dentures)

Cracked tooth or Broken tooth

(Root canal)

Start Online Consultation

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### Patient Information

Safe and Secure...

Where should we email your treatment plan?\*

What is the best phone number to reach you?\*

What's the patient's name?\*

What's the patient's birth year?\*

What's the patient's postal code?\*

Continue

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### Based on your response

Answer the appropriate question

What is your primary goal?\*

_\\* Describe what you want to accomplish_

What are your top priorities?\*

Quality of Care

Affordability

Length of Treatment

Convenience

_\\* Select all that apply_

What date will be suitable for patient?\*

What time will be suitable for patient?\*

Continue to photos

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### FIRST WASH YOUR HANDS

You may also use Spoons to do this...

It's much easier to take the pictures of your teeth using a Cell Phone. Enter your mobile number below and we'll send a link to your phone to continue. You won't loose your place!

_If you are from USA enter your mobile number below. And if you are outside of USA enter your email._

Send link to mobile

[No thanks, I'll upload photos](https://drparmars.com/#)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### Based on your response

Answer the appropriate question

###### On the next screen, we will take 5 photographs.

This will help the doctor to get you an accurate treatment plan.

![Smile](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/camera.png)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-1.jpg)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-2.jpg)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-3.jpg)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-4.jpg)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-5.jpg)

This allows us to customize your treatment plan. Here's a quick video to help take perfect pics:

Continue to photos

###### On this screen, we'll take 5 pics

![Smile](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/camera.png)

Now to get a few quick photos of your teeth so we can get you an accurate treatment plan.

First take a selfie of your teeth straight on as shown.

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-1.jpg)

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/tooth-01.jpg)

Now take a selfie of the left side of your teeth, using your finger to stretch your cheek.

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-2.jpg)

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/tooth-01.jpg)

Now take a selfie of the right side of your teeth, using your finger to stretch your cheek.

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-3.jpg)

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/tooth-01.jpg)

Take a selfie of top of your teeth, as you were looking up.

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-4.jpg)

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/tooth-01.jpg)

Take a selfie of bottom of your teeth, as you were looking down.

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/example-5.jpg)

![TeleDentcare](https://drparmars.com/plugin/images/tooth-01.jpg)

![Avatar](https://drparmars.com/)

###### You're Done

Doctor will email your personal assessment soon! We'll text you when it's ready :)

Close this Window

Start Over

#### Best Rated Dentist in Chula Vista,  San Diego.

## Our Chula Vista dental services  include:

In-house denture lab for SAME-DAY relines & denture repairs.

Pediatric Dentistry: Dentistry for kids.

Implant surgeries & restorations.

Stress-Free Sedation Dentistry

Teeth-In-A-Day using full arch implants.

Prosthodontics: Customized Dentures, crowns and bridges

Advanced cosmetic dental care using customized veeners and crowns.

Endodontics: Root canal therapy

Preferred Invisalign ® Dentist in Chula Vista.

Treatment for cracked or chipped teeth

## Opening Hours

Monday:

8 am - 5 pm

Tuesday:

8 am - 5 pm

8 am - 5 pm

Thursday:

8 am - 5 pm

Friday:

8 am - 1 pm

Saturday & Sunday Closed

![drparmar](https://drparmars.com/images/drparmar.jpg)

We believe that you deserve a dental office where you feel welcome, heard and safe, where you
will be treated with compassion at all times. That is why we are rated as best dentist in Chula
Vista We invite you to schedule a consultation at our dental office, for yourself or a loved
one.

Come in , meet our team, and learn how we can help you attain excellent oral health and a
beautiful smile.

![tooth](https://drparmars.com/images/home/tooth.png)

#### Where Art meets Dentistry

* * *

![smiling](https://drparmars.com/images/home/smiling.png)

#### Where Passion and Smiles Work Together

* * *

![helping](https://drparmars.com/images/home/helping.png)

#### We treat you like family

* * *

As a family-friendly, patient-focused dental office, we put you at the forefront of all we do.
Dr. Avani R. Parmar and Dr. Nirmal M. Shah and the entire team never lose sight of the fact that
we are here to serve you, offering professional, gentle care that will help you achieve and
maintain excellent oral health and a strong, beautiful smile


[Read More](https://drparmars.com/about-us.php#setusapart)

![Google](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/googlelogo/svg/googlelogo_clr_74x24px.svg)

★★★★★

I've had an exceptional experience at this dentist office. The people there are very nice and patient oriented. I completely trust Dr. Shah, enjoy my visits to his office, and interacting with his staff is fun and pleasant. Dr. Gistaro is still around even though he sold his wonderful practice to Dr. Shaw -- he can talk baseball with ANYONE! :-) They definitely won me over, I'm now a patient for life! Highly recommend.

C

Cindy S.

2 months ago

![Google](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/googlelogo/svg/googlelogo_clr_74x24px.svg)

★★★★★

I have been so pleased with the dental work I have received from both Dr Shah and Dr Parmer. They are so gentle and put me at ease whenever I see them. I would highly recommend them to anyone! They do it all!!

B

Brian A.

3 months ago

![Google](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/googlelogo/svg/googlelogo_clr_74x24px.svg)

★★★★★

I found this dental office by chance, stopping in to ask directions to another business. Knowing I was due for a 6-month cleaning, I made an appointment. I'm 66, so I've been to scores of dentists across the country. This is by far the best dental experience I've ever had. Dr. Shaw and his staff are friendly, punctual, and very professional. If I lived in San Diego, I would be a client for life; as it is, I will try to "time" my trips to this area to coincide with my dental health needs so that I can use this office. Without reservation, 5 stars.

K

Keisha R.

4 months ago

★★★★★

S

★★★★★

metadata.title: Best Family Dentistry Chula Vista Ca , Super Dentist, Dentistas En Chula Vista - Dr. Parmars
metadata.Description: Best family dentistry in Chula Vista California. Dr. Parmars Family Dentistry has super team of dentist expertise in family, and cosmetic dentistry serving from more than 30 years. Schedule your Dentistas En Chula Vista appointment now: +16194266891

data.summary: The Dr. Parmar Family Dentist website offers a virtual appointment service for dental consultations without needing an office visit. Patients can provide essential information, select treatment options such as cosmetic dentistry, crooked teeth correction, or replacements for missing teeth. The process includes taking five selfies of their teeth to help generate an accurate treatment plan. The practice emphasizes safe and secure communication and patient comfort, highlighting a variety of services, including pediatric dentistry, implant surgeries, and cosmetic procedures. They operate Monday to Friday and boast a comfortable environment with a focus on delivering quality care.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
